sections.paragraph:
ἀνατέλλω [ἀνά, τέλλω ‘come into being’, cp. ἀνατολή; with focus on coming into existence and freq. with apparent suddenness as component]

—1. cause to rise, the sun Mt 5:45.

—2. intr. ‘move upward from an originating point’, rise, come up

—a. of phenomena in the visible heaven: dawn, φῶς in imagery Mt 4:16; sun 13:6; Mk 4:6; 16:2; Js 1:11; cloud Lk 12:54; in imagery of Christ, the φωσφόρος 2 Pt 1:19.

—b. originate, be descended Hb 7:14.
